allow: Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON' import re with open\('/Users/fg/Desktop/CRM-project/src-vue/views/ClientProfile.vue', 'r'\) as f: content = f.read\(\) # Extract template content template_match = re.search\(r'', content, re.DOTALL\) if not template_match: print\("No template found"\) exit\(1\) template_content = template_match.group\(1\) # Count all div opening tags \(excluding self-closing\) opening_divs = re.findall\(r']*>', template_content\) # Count all closing div tags closing_divs = re.findall\(r'', template_content\) print\(f"Opening div tags: {len\(opening_divs\)}"\) print\(f"Closing div tags: {len\(closing_divs\)}"\) print\(f"Difference: {len\(opening_divs\) - len\(closing_divs\)}"\) # Find lines with unbalanced divs lines = template_content.split\('\\n'\) depth = 0 for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\): open_count = len\(re.findall\(r']*>', line\)\) close_count = len\(re.findall\(r'', line\)\) if open_count > 0 or close_count > 0: new_depth = depth + open_count - close_count if new_depth < 0: print\(f"Line {i}: ERROR - Negative depth! {depth} + {open_count} - {close_count} = {new_depth}"\) print\(f" {line.strip\(\)}"\) depth = new_depth print\(f"Final depth: {depth}"\) PYTHON)
